zh.Plymouth, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯

zh.Plymouth St Andrew, Devon, England: 英國戴文普萊姆斯普萊姆斯 聖 安德魯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Woode於1579年出生在英國戴文普萊姆斯時，她的父親Richard Woode34歲，母親Margaret Heird29歲。她於1600年4月21日與William Stephens在英國戴文普萊姆斯普萊姆斯 聖 安德魯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年3月20日在英國戴文普萊姆斯享年27歲，埋葬在英國戴文普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Woode于1579年出生在英国戴文普萊姆斯时，她的父亲Richard Woode34岁，母亲Margaret Heird29岁。她于1600年4月21日与William Stephens在英国戴文普萊姆斯普萊姆斯 聖 安德魯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年3月20日在英国戴文普萊姆斯享年27岁，埋葬在英国戴文普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Woode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Wood
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Woode was born in 1579, in Plymouth, Devon, England, her father, Richard Woode, was 34 and her mother, Margaret Heird, was 29. She married William Stephens on 21 April 1600, in Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 March 1606, in Plymouth, Devon, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Plymouth, Devon, England.

Elle a épousé William Stephens le 21 avril 1600, à Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1606, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre.

ko.Plymouth St Andrew, Devon, England: 영국 데폰 플림우스 플림우스 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Woode(이)가 1579년 영국 데폰 플림우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Woode(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Heird(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1600년 4월 21일 영국 데폰 플림우스 플림우스 스트 앤드루에서 William Stephens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 3월 20일 영국 데폰 플림우스에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 플림우스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Stephens em 21 de abril de 1600, em Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Plymouth St Andrew, Devon, England: плимоут ст андрю, плимоут, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Woode родилась в 1579 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Woode было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Heird, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Stephens 21 апреля 1600 г. в местности плимоут ст андрю, плимоут, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 марта 1606 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности плимоут, девон, Англия.
